summary: This presentation outlines the KeepMeCompany AI phone agent product designed for NHS GP practices to reduce patient wait times and improve GP efficiency. It contrasts current receptionist workflows with the proposed AI solution, quantifying time savings and capacity impacts. The document also details the implementation roadmap, including telephony setup, legal agreements, and phased rollout strategies.
